name: WpfBoltCatalogStandard
summary: The WpfBoltCatalogStandard class represents a control to select the bolt standard using the bolt catalog. Bolt catalog controls always need to be in pairs, meaning in every dialog there has to be a WpfBoltCatalogStandard and a WpfBoltCatalogSize control.

constructors.name: WpfBoltCatalogStandard
constructors.summary: Initiates a new instance of the control.

properties.name: BoltSizes
properties.summary: Returns bolt sizes in catalog based on selected grade
